title.en: Does God Exist? The Jewish Philosophical Arguments
title.zh: 上帝存在吗?犹太哲学论证
title.he: האם אלוהים קיים? הטיעונים הפילוסופיים היהודיים

description: A survey of classical and modern arguments for God's existence from Rambam, the Kuzari, and contemporary thinkers.

historical_figures.name: Rambam (Maimonides)
historical_figures.role: Medieval Jewish philosopher, author of Guide for the Perplexed

historical_figures.name: Rabbi Yehuda HaLevi
historical_figures.role: Author of The Kuzari, developer of historical argument

chinese_parallels.connection: Medieval Jewish philosophy developed during this era
Parallels Jewish concept of necessary being
Compared to Jewish concept of God
